Class KeYFile

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.KeYFile
All Implemented Interfaces:
EnvInput
Direct Known Subclasses:
KeYUserProblemFile
public class KeYFile extends Object implements EnvInput
Represents an input from a .key file producing an environment.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    protected final RuleSource
    file
    the RuleSource delivering the input stream for the file.
    protected InitConfig
    initConfig
     
    protected final @Nullable ProgressMonitor
    monitor
    the graphical entity to notify on the state of reading.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    KeYFile(String name, RuleSource file, @Nullable ProgressMonitor monitor, Profile profile)
    creates a new representation for a given file by indicating a name and a RuleSource representing the physical source of the .key file.
    KeYFile(String name, RuleSource file, ProgressMonitor monitor, Profile profile, FileRepo fileRepo)
    creates a new representation for a given file by indicating a name and a RuleSource representing the physical source of the .key file.
    KeYFile(String name, Path file, FileRepo fileRepo, ProgressMonitor monitor, Profile profile, boolean compressed)
    Creates a new representation for a given file by indicating a name and a file representing the physical source of the .key file.
    KeYFile(String name, Path file, ProgressMonitor monitor, Profile profile)
    creates a new representation for a given file by indicating a name and a file representing the physical source of the .key file.
    KeYFile(String name, Path file, ProgressMonitor monitor, Profile profile, boolean compressed)
    Creates a new representation for a given file by indicating a name and a file representing the physical source of the .key file.

    Returns the name of this input.

    Reads the input using the given modification strategy, i.e., parts of the input do not modify the initial configuration while others do.

    gets the boot classpath element, null if none set.

    gets the classpath elements to be considered here.

    reads contracts and rule definitions

    reads sort, function and predicate declarations

    reads the functions and predicates declared in the .key file only, modifying the function namespaces of the respective taclet options.

    Reads the include section and returns an Includes object.
    Path

    Reads the Java path.

    reads the rules and problems declared in the .key file only, modifying the set of rules of the initial configuration
    Collection<PositionedString>

    reads the sorts declaration of the .key file only, modifying the sort namespace of the initial configuration

    Sets the initial configuration the read environment input should be added to.

  • Field Details

    • file

      protected final RuleSource file
      the RuleSource delivering the input stream for the file.

    • monitor

      protected final @Nullable ProgressMonitor monitor
      the graphical entity to notify on the state of reading.

    • initConfig

      protected InitConfig initConfig

  • Constructor Details

    • KeYFile

      public KeYFile(String name, RuleSource file, @Nullable ProgressMonitor monitor, Profile profile)
      creates a new representation for a given file by indicating a name and a RuleSource representing the physical source of the .key file.

    • KeYFile

      public KeYFile(String name, RuleSource file, ProgressMonitor monitor, Profile profile, FileRepo fileRepo)
      creates a new representation for a given file by indicating a name and a RuleSource representing the physical source of the .key file.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the file
      file - the physical rule source of the .key file
      monitor - monitor for reporting progress
      profile - the profile
      fileRepo - the FileRepo which will store the file

    • KeYFile

      public KeYFile(String name, Path file, ProgressMonitor monitor, Profile profile)
      creates a new representation for a given file by indicating a name and a file representing the physical source of the .key file.

    • KeYFile

      public KeYFile(String name, Path file, ProgressMonitor monitor, Profile profile, boolean compressed)
      Creates a new representation for a given file by indicating a name and a file representing the physical source of the .key file.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the resource
      file - the file to find it
      monitor - a possibly null reference to a monitor for the loading progress
      profile - the KeY profile under which the file is to be load
      compressed - true iff the file has compressed content

    • KeYFile

      public KeYFile(String name, Path file, FileRepo fileRepo, ProgressMonitor monitor, Profile profile, boolean compressed)
      Creates a new representation for a given file by indicating a name and a file representing the physical source of the .key file.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the resource
      file - the file to find it
      fileRepo - the FileRepo which will store the file
      monitor - a possibly null reference to a monitor for the loading progress
      profile - the KeY profile under which the file is to be load
      compressed - true iff the file has compressed content

    • setInitConfig

      public void setInitConfig(InitConfig conf)
      Description copied from interface: EnvInput
      Sets the initial configuration the read environment input should be added to. Must be called before calling any of the read* methods.
      Specified by:
      setInitConfig in interface EnvInput

      Reads the Java path.

      Throws:

    • read

      public ImmutableSet<PositionedString> read() throws ProofInputException
      Description copied from interface: EnvInput
      Reads the input using the given modification strategy, i.e., parts of the input do not modify the initial configuration while others do.
      Specified by:
      read in interface EnvInput
      Returns:
      The found warnings or an empty ImmutableSet if no warnings occurred.
      Throws:
      ProofInputException

    • readExtendedSignature

      public ImmutableSet<PositionedString> readExtendedSignature()
      reads sort, function and predicate declarations
      Returns:
      list of parser warnings

    • readContracts

      public ImmutableSet<PositionedString> readContracts()
      reads contracts and rule definitions
      Returns:
      list of parser warnings

    • getProblemFinder

      protected @NonNull ProblemFinder getProblemFinder()

    • readSorts

      public Collection<PositionedString> readSorts()
      reads the sorts declaration of the .key file only, modifying the sort namespace of the initial configuration

    • readFuncAndPred

      public List<PositionedString> readFuncAndPred()
      reads the functions and predicates declared in the .key file only, modifying the function namespaces of the respective taclet options.
      Returns:
      warnings during the interpretation of the AST constructs

    • readRules

      public List<BuildingIssue> readRules()
      reads the rules and problems declared in the .key file only, modifying the set of rules of the initial configuration
      Returns:
      list of issues that occurred during parsing the taclets

    • close

      public void close()

    • getPositionedStrings

      protected List<PositionedString> getPositionedStrings(List<BuildingIssue> issues)
      constructs positioned strings from BuildingIssues such that they can be displayed like other issues
      Parameters:
      issues - the BuildingIssues to be converted into PositionedStrings
      Returns:
      list containing a PositionedString for each BuildingIssue in issues
